_comment: Committed sense-dupe exemptions for audit_sense_dupes.py, the REPRODUCIBLE home for declarations that would otherwise live in the gitignored per-root rootmaps (src/pilot/input/, regenerated by _pilot_gen_merged.py). See PROCESS_AUDIT_2026-06-29.md rec 15. Two mechanisms: (1) top-level subkey -> {batch_of: TAG} declares an intentional citation-budget split of ONE canonical sense; (2) _dupe_exempt declares known cross-LEVEL sense-number reuse that the flat tag namespace cannot separate.
_dupe_exempt_comment: root(safe_root) -> homonym -> [tags] for verified-faithful cross-level sense-number reuse (NOT model over-production). siD homonym-2 (si_d~~h1): PWG re-uses sense numbers 3/4 across the verb (pwg00: 3 giltig sein, 4 zu Theil werden) vs the DERIVED NOUNS (pwg02: 3 = f. siddhā, 4 = n. Zaubermacht), and tag ppp-siddha-2/3 across the BASE participle siddha (pwg03) vs PREFIX participles prasiddha/saṃsiddha (pwg02). Rendered content verified distinct + faithful to source 2026-06-30; re-translation would not help since the numbers genuinely repeat in print. See SIDH_DUPE_INVESTIGATION.md.
